title: COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS - 211info
text: IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An educational program that draws from the latest research on violence prevention. Providers go into local classrooms to teach children and youth how to get help if they are being abused or are living with violence. Offers programs to teach children that they have the right to be safe, to listen to their feelings, and to tell and keep telling safe adults when they need help. Also teaches adults (parents, caregivers, and teachers) how to listen to children, how to identify abuse indicators, and how to respond appropriately. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Grades K-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 721-6792 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 721-1740 Reception Main phone (503) 721-6792 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule a workshop series/training FEES: Donations are appreciated DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Portland and Vancouver SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Limited parking; street parking encouraged. Accessible by MAX blue line and TriMet bus line 20. Services: Bullying Prevention Child Abuse Prevention Youth Violence Prevention Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CORE HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WORKER OF THE DAY INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY RESOURCE DESK SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AKA SCIENCE UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
